{{Event Header|StS2 Colossal Flower.png}} {{E|Colossal Flower|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Extract Nectar}} {{TS|positive||Gain 35 Gold.}}
{{Frame|Reach Deeper}} {{TS|negative||Lose 5 HP.}} Advance to the next level. * Level 2: {{Frame|Extract Nectar}} Gain 75 Gold. / {{Frame|Reach Deeper}} {{TS|negative||Lose 6 HP.}} * Level 3: {{Frame|Extract Nectar}} Gain 135 Gold. / {{Frame|Enter the Center}} {{TS|negative||Lose 7 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain {{R|Pollinous Core||2}}.}} == Conditions == * Only appears if you have at least 19 HP. == Dialogue ==
{{Frame|Reach Deeper (Level 1)}}
You push past a layer of razor-sharp petals, they're coated with a substance that makes your skin tingle. This seems to numb the pain? Maybe this is why there is a pile of bones here...
{{Frame|Reach Deeper (Level 2)}}
The tingling turns into a throbbing weakness as you push onwards... This flower wants to eat me. Why did I go into it?
{{Frame|Extract Nectar}}
You carefully gather some nectar from the flower's flesh. The petals shimmer angrily.
{{Frame|Extract (after reaching deeper)}}
Your whole body is numb and messed up from the toxins, barbs, and leaves. Enough is enough. You stow away a glob of high-quality nectar and retreat.
{{Frame|Enter the Center}}
With a final lunge you grab hold of the pollinous core! The plant shudders violently; its petals go dull, and the tingling stops. The golden nectar becomes worthless muck. You killed it.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
